title: Google Sheets Spreadsheet
description: JSON Schema for a Google Sheets Spreadsheet resource representing the complete structure of a spreadsheet including its properties, sheets, named ranges, developer metadata, and data sources as defined by the Google Sheets API v4.

spreadsheetId.description: The unique identifier of the spreadsheet. This field is read-only and assigned by Google Sheets upon creation.

sheets.description: The sheets that are part of the spreadsheet.

namedRanges.description: The named ranges defined in the spreadsheet.

spreadsheetUrl.description: The URL of the spreadsheet. This field is read-only.

developerMetadata.description: The developer metadata associated with the spreadsheet.

dataSources.description: A list of external data sources connected to the spreadsheet.

dataSourceSchedules.description: Output only. A list of data source refresh schedules.

SpreadsheetProperties.description: Properties of a spreadsheet including title, locale, recalculation interval, time zone, default cell format, and theme.

locale.description: The locale of the spreadsheet in ISO 639-1/639-2 format, optionally combined with a country code (e.g., en, eng, en_US).

autoRecalc.description: The amount of time to wait before volatile functions are recalculated.

timeZone.description: The time zone of the spreadsheet in CLDR format (e.g., America/New_York).

importFunctionsExternalUrlAccessAllowed.description: Whether to allow external URL access for image and import functions.

Sheet.description: A sheet within a spreadsheet containing properties, cell data, merges, conditional formats, filters, charts, and more.

data.description: Data in the grid, if this is a grid sheet. The number of GridData objects returned is dependent on the number of ranges requested on this sheet.

merges.description: The ranges that are merged together.

conditionalFormats.description: The conditional format rules in this sheet.

filterViews.description: The filter views in this sheet.

protectedRanges.description: The protected ranges in this sheet.

charts.description: The specifications of every chart on this sheet.

bandedRanges.description: The banded (alternating colors) ranges on this sheet.

SheetProperties.description: Properties of a sheet including its ID, title, index, type, grid properties, and display settings.

sheetId.description: The ID of the sheet. Must be non-negative. Cannot be changed once set.

index.description: The zero-based index of the sheet within the spreadsheet.

hidden.description: True if the sheet is hidden in the UI, false if visible.

rightToLeft.description: True if the sheet is an RTL sheet instead of an LTR sheet.

GridProperties.description: Properties of a grid including row and column counts, frozen dimensions, and gridline visibility.

rowCount.description: The number of rows in the grid.

columnCount.description: The number of columns in the grid.

frozenRowCount.description: The number of rows that are frozen in the grid.

frozenColumnCount.description: The number of columns that are frozen in the grid.

hideGridlines.description: True if the grid is not showing gridlines in the UI.

rowGroupControlAfter.description: True if the row grouping control toggle is shown after the group.

columnGroupControlAfter.description: True if the column grouping control toggle is shown after the group.

GridData.description: Data in the grid including cell values, formatting, and dimension metadata.

startRow.description: The first row this GridData refers to, zero-based.

startColumn.description: The first column this GridData refers to, zero-based.

rowData.description: The data in the grid, one entry per row.

RowData.description: Data about each cell in a row.

values.description: The values in the row, one per column.

CellData.description: Data about a specific cell including its value, format, hyperlink, notes, and data validation.

formattedValue.description: The formatted value of the cell as shown to the user. Read-only.

hyperlink.description: A hyperlink this cell points to, if any. Read-only.

textFormatRuns.description: Runs of rich text applied to subsections of the cell.

ExtendedValue.description: The kinds of value that a cell in a spreadsheet can have.

message.description: A message with more information about the error.

CellFormat.description: The format of a cell including number format, colors, borders, padding, alignment, text format, and rotation.

horizontalAlignment.description: The horizontal alignment of the value in the cell.

verticalAlignment.description: The vertical alignment of the value in the cell.

wrapStrategy.description: The wrap strategy for the value in the cell.

textDirection.description: The direction of the text in the cell.

hyperlinkDisplayType.description: How a hyperlink should be displayed in the cell.

NumberFormat.description: The number format of a cell.

type.description: The type of the number format.

TextFormat.description: The format of a run of text including font, size, color, and style.

bold.description: True if the text is bold.

italic.description: True if the text is italicized.

strikethrough.description: True if the text has a strikethrough.

underline.description: True if the text is underlined.

link.description: The link destination of the text, if any.

TextFormatRun.description: A run of a text format. The format of this run continues until the start index of the next run.

startIndex.description: The character index where this run starts (zero-based).

Color.description: Represents a color in the RGBA color space with values in the range [0, 1].

red.description: The amount of red in the color.

green.description: The amount of green in the color.

blue.description: The amount of blue in the color.

alpha.description: The fraction of this color that should be applied to the pixel. 1.0 corresponds to a solid color.

ColorStyle.description: A color value that can be either an RGB color or a theme color reference.

Padding.description: The amount of padding around the cell, in pixels.

top.description: The top padding of the cell.

right.description: The right padding of the cell.

bottom.description: The bottom padding of the cell.

left.description: The left padding of the cell.

TextRotation.description: The rotation applied to text in a cell.

angle.description: The angle between the standard orientation and the desired orientation. Valid values are between -90 and 90.

vertical.description: If true, text reads top to bottom, but the orientation of individual characters is unchanged.

GridRange.description: A range on a sheet. All indexes are zero-based.

sheetId.description: The sheet this range is on.

startRowIndex.description: The start row (inclusive) of the range.

endRowIndex.description: The end row (exclusive) of the range.

startColumnIndex.description: The start column (inclusive) of the range.

endColumnIndex.description: The end column (exclusive) of the range.

NamedRange.description: A named range in a spreadsheet.

namedRangeId.description: The ID of the named range.

name.description: The name of the named range.

DimensionProperties.description: Properties about a dimension (row or column).

hiddenByFilter.description: True if this dimension is being filtered.

hiddenByUser.description: True if this dimension is explicitly hidden.

pixelSize.description: The height (for rows) or width (for columns) of the dimension in pixels.

developerMetadata.description: The developer metadata associated with a single row or column.

DeveloperMetadata.description: Developer metadata associated with a location or object in a spreadsheet.

metadataId.description: The spreadsheet-scoped unique ID that identifies the metadata.

metadataValue.description: Data associated with the metadata's key.

DeveloperMetadataLocation.description: A location where metadata may be associated in a spreadsheet.

spreadsheet.description: True when metadata is associated with an entire spreadsheet.

sheetId.description: The ID of the sheet when metadata is associated with an entire sheet.

DimensionRange.description: A range along a single dimension on a sheet.

sheetId.description: The sheet this span is on.

DataSource.description: Information about an external data source in the spreadsheet.

dataSourceId.description: The spreadsheet-scoped unique ID that identifies the data source.

calculatedColumns.description: All calculated columns in the data source.

sheetId.description: The ID of the Sheet connected with the data source.

DataSourceSpec.description: The details of a data source.

parameters.description: The parameters of the data source.

BigQueryDataSourceSpec.description: The specification of a BigQuery data source connected to a sheet.

projectId.description: The ID of a BigQuery enabled Google Cloud project with a billing account attached.

tableProjectId.description: The ID of a BigQuery project the table belongs to.

DataSourceColumn.description: A column in a data source.

name.description: The display name of the column.

formula.description: The formula of the calculated column.

DataSourceParameter.description: A parameter in a data source's query.

DataSourceRefreshSchedule.description: Schedule for refreshing a data source.

enabled.description: True if the refresh schedule is enabled.

nextRun.description: Output only. The time interval of the next run.

DataSourceSheetProperties.description: Additional properties of a DATA_SOURCE sheet.

dataSourceId.description: ID of the DataSource the sheet is connected to.

columns.description: The columns displayed on the sheet.

state.description: The state of the data execution.

errorMessage.description: The error message, which may be empty.

lastRefreshTime.description: The time the data last successfully refreshed.

DataSourceTable.description: A data source table which allows importing a static table of data from a DataSource into Sheets.

dataSourceId.description: The ID of the data source the table is associated with.

rowLimit.description: The limit of rows to return.

dataSourceId.description: The ID of the data source the formula is associated with.

FilterSpec.description: The filter criteria associated with a specific column.

FilterCriteria.description: Criteria for showing/hiding rows in a filter or filter view.

BooleanCondition.description: A condition that can evaluate to true or false.

userEnteredValue.description: A value the condition is based on.

SortSpec.description: A sort order associated with a specific column or row.

dimensionIndex.description: The dimension the sort should be applied to.

sortOrder.description: The order data should be sorted.

inputMessage.description: A message to show the user when adding data to the cell.

strict.description: True if invalid data should be rejected.

showCustomUi.description: True if the UI should be customized based on the kind of condition.

PivotTable.description: A pivot table anchored at a cell in the spreadsheet.

rows.description: Each row grouping in the pivot table.

columns.description: Each column grouping in the pivot table.

values.description: A list of values to include in the pivot table.

valueLayout.description: Whether values should be listed horizontally or vertically.

dataSourceId.description: The ID of the data source the pivot table is reading data from.

ConditionalFormatRule.description: A rule describing a conditional format.

ranges.description: The ranges that are formatted if the condition is true.

booleanRule.description: The formatting is either on or off according to the rule.

gradientRule.description: The formatting will vary based on the gradients in the rule.

InterpolationPoint.description: A single interpolation point on a gradient conditional format.

type.description: How the value should be interpreted.

value.description: The value this interpolation point uses.

FilterView.description: A filter view on a sheet.

filterViewId.description: The ID of the filter view.

title.description: The name of the filter view.

namedRangeId.description: The named range this filter view is backed by, if any.

ProtectedRange.description: A protected range within a sheet.

protectedRangeId.description: The ID of the protected range.

namedRangeId.description: The named range this protected range is backed by, if any.

description.description: The description of this protected range.

warningOnly.description: True if this protected range will show a warning when editing.

requestingUserCanEdit.description: True if the user who requested this protected range can edit the protected area.

unprotectedRanges.description: The list of unprotected ranges within a protected sheet.

editors.description: The users and groups with edit access to the protected range.

BasicFilter.description: The default filter associated with a sheet.

EmbeddedChart.description: A chart embedded in a sheet.

EmbeddedObjectPosition.description: The position of an embedded object such as a chart.

overlayPosition.description: The position at which the object is overlaid on top of a grid.

newSheet.description: If true, the embedded object is put on a new sheet.

sheetId.description: The sheet this coordinate is on.

rowIndex.description: The row index of the coordinate.

columnIndex.description: The column index of the coordinate.

BandedRange.description: A banded (alternating colors) range in a sheet.

bandedRangeId.description: The ID of the banded range.

BandingProperties.description: Properties referring to a single dimension of banded ranges.

IterativeCalculationSettings.description: Settings to control how circular dependencies are resolved with iterative calculation.

maxIterations.description: When iterative calculation is enabled, the maximum number of calculation rounds to perform.

convergenceThreshold.description: When iterative calculation is enabled and successive results differ by less than this threshold, calculation stops.

primaryFontFamily.description: Name of the primary font family.
